---
title: "February 2026"
date: 2026-02-01
categories: [2026, Q1]
description: "National monthly summary of NMC notifications for February 2026 — Category 1 & 2 conditions, provincial breakdown, data quality, and NMC App statistics."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Reporting period: **1 – 28 February 2026**. Data sourced from the NMC Surveillance System (NMCSS).
:::

[View Report](../rendered/2026-02-monthly-report.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} &nbsp;
[Download Word](../rendered/2026-02-monthly-report.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary download="2026-02-monthly-report.docx"}
